message_text: Everyone talks about 'culture' like it's one thing, but they only show you what *they* want you to see. Trust me, driving cross-country, you see the REAL culture, not the sanitized version on TV. They push certain narratives to keep us divided, so we don't look closer. Always question what's presented as 'truth'. There's always another side they don't want you knowing. Wake up! #HiddenTruths #CultureWar

Trucking across the country, you see so many cultures. It's beautiful how unique each one is, like different landscapes! Just hope we always remember to respect and learn from each other, not lose those special traditions. #Culture #Respect
